reviews.comment:
Buena ypf. Excelente limpieza de los baños. El playero medio apurado no me cargo los puntos de la serviclub.. más allá de eso todo correcto

(Translated by Google)
Good YPF. Excellent cleanliness of the restrooms. The attendant seemed a bit rushed and didn't credit my Serviclub points... other than that, everything was fine.
